hero.title: A Song Made Just for Them
hero.subtitle: Create a personalized song in authentic Latin styles — Bachata, Cumbia, Reggaeton, Corridos, Vallenato, Salsa — for any special occasion.

landing.subtitle: Birthdays, Weddings, Baptisms, Tributes... Turn your messages into unforgettable songs with AI.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: See how they turned their events into a one-of-a-kind song.

testimonials.quote: I created a song for the couple's entrance at my sister's wedding. Everyone cried. It was magical!
testimonials.author: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: For my dad's 50th we made a salsa telling his story. Best gift of the night.
testimonials.author: Moses D.

testimonials.quote: I used CantaMe to congratulate my son on his graduation. He couldn't believe it was a unique song for him.
testimonials.author: Aisha T.

occasions.title: What's the Occasion?
occasions.subtitle: Choose the celebration and we'll guide you to the perfect song.

styles.title: Choose the Musical Style
styles.subtitle: Each style has a unique feel. Listen to a sample before you decide.
styles.surpriseDesc: We'll pick the perfect style for your occasion

form.title: Personalize Your Song
form.subtitle: Tell us about the person who will receive this gift. The more details, the more unique the song.
form.anecdote1Placeholder: e.g. The time we danced together at her quinceañera rehearsal...
form.anecdote2Placeholder: e.g. She always sings in the kitchen while cooking...
form.messagePlaceholder: e.g. You are the light of our family, we love you forever...

preview.title: Your Song Preview
preview.subtitle: Here's a 30-second preview of your personalized song. Imagine {name}'s reaction when they hear the full version!
preview.cta: Imagine {name}'s face when they hear the full song...

auth.signUpSubtitle: Create an account to save your song and continue.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to continue with your order.
auth.name: Full name
auth.continueContext: You're about to create the song for {name}
auth.secureNote: Your data is protected. Payment comes next.

checkout.title: Complete Your Order
checkout.subtitle: You're just one step away from creating an unforgettable moment.
checkout.emailHelp: We'll send the song to this email when it's ready.
checkout.secure: Secure payment. Your data is protected.

order.title: Order Confirmed! 🎉
order.subtitle: We're creating something special for {name}.
order.receiptNote: ✅ Payment confirmed. We've sent a receipt to your email. Your full song is available here to play and download as MP3.

dashboard.paidTitle: Payment confirmed — welcome to your dashboard!
dashboard.subtitle: Here's everything about your songs.
dashboard.empty: You haven't created any songs yet.
dashboard.name: Name

share.title: {name}, this song was created especially for you
share.subtitle: With love, a unique song made just for you.

revision.title: Revise Your Song
revision.subtitle: Tell us what to change and we'll re-create it instantly.
revision.whatToChange: What would you like to change?
revision.placeholder: e.g. Change the tempo to be slower, add the nickname 'Lupita', make it more emotional...
revision.regenerating: 🎧 Re-creating your song right now... This may take a couple of minutes. Please don't close this page.
revision.success: Done! Your new version is ready.

gallery.title: Song Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Listen to examples of songs we've created. Find your inspiration!

howItWorks.title: How Does It Work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Creating a personalized song is easy. Just follow these 4 simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Select the celebration — a quinceañera, wedding, birthday, serenade, or any special moment.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Bachata, Cumbia, Reggaeton, Corridos, Vallenato... listen to samples and choose your favorite.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Tell us the recipient's name, share memories, and add a special message. No songwriting skills needed!
howItWorks.step4Desc: Get your personalized song by email and share it via WhatsApp, Instagram, or play it at the celebration.

footer.tagline: Personalized songs in authentic Latin styles for every special occasion.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
